summary.value: Engineer who builds and owns production AI systems end to end — the retrieval, agents, event-driven backends, CI/CD, observability and IaC around them. Self-taught into code at AECOM, promoted from consultant to tech lead in two years, now shipping GenAI for banks, media and retail.

responsibilities.value: Built a production RAG over 600,000 pages of internal banking regulation (PDF, Word, Excel) as lead engineer on a year-long embedded Banca Generali engagement — structure-aware chunking, hierarchical retrieval, version-aware metadata and an event-driven sync pipeline into the bank's platforms, quality-gated by a golden evaluation set. In production, rolling out across 1,600 employees.

Built a governed tool layer that lets AI agents run SQL and geospatial operations — a GraphQL wrapper with RBAC constraining each agent call to the user's role. Non-technical users chat with their data beside a live map; productized for clients including Regione Lombardia and NielsenIQ.

Led the engineering team that built an AI pipeline generating on-model product photography for Benetton (ComfyUI, Flux, LoRAs on Azure GPUs) at up to 90 SKUs/day with hybrid human-and-AI QA — replacing studio photoshoots for most of the brand's ecommerce imagery by autumn 2025.

Developed the vision-language pipeline that estimates a meal's carbohydrates from a single photo for T.Conto (a consumer nutrition app live on the App Store and Google Play), using agents to retrieve ingredient reference values from a vector store of the official food-composition tables.
Own the production LLMOps lifecycle: evaluation-driven development for groundedness and guardrailing, with end-to-end tracing and monitoring via OpenTelemetry, Langfuse and cloud-native dashboards.

Led a 3-person team to ship, end-to-end on Azure, an AI geolocation game for GIS Day (Esri-sponsored) whose GenAI engine generated adaptive riddles from the target's and the player's coordinates — played by around 1,500 colleagues across Jakala.
Led a team of four to build a RAG chatbot for Corriere della Sera's Il Tempo della Salute conference, grounded in an overnight video-transcription pipeline (Azure Speech, Azure AI Search).

experience.title: Environmental Engineer
experience.description: Remediation of contaminated industrial sites for ENI, Q8 and the US DoD.

responsibilities.value: Built Python pipelines (geopandas, GDAL, rasterio, PostGIS) that turned days of manual GIS work into hours — open-sourced on GitHub as /latex{\href{https://github.com/giocaizzi/py3dinterpolations}{\underline{py3dinterpolations}}}.
Project management: proposals, bidding, budgeting, planning and client relations.

experience.title: Geospatial Data Scientist — MSc Thesis
experience.description: Designed and implemented, in Python, a spatial-interpolation algorithm for high-resolution PM2.5 pollution mapping from a dense real-time sensor network — my MSc thesis, in collaboration with the Wiseair startup.

experience.title: Brand Activation & Live Events
experience.description: Seven years of live brand-activation at major sporting events across Europe, alongside my studies — public speaking and running games/giveaways for crowds, trilingually.

education.degree: MSc (102/110) and BSc (97/110) in Environmental & Land Planning Engineering

msc.label: Relevant coursework
msc.courses: computer science (30/30), GIS & spatial data, statistical models & stochastic processes, remote sensing

bsc.label: Theses
bsc.courses: PM2.5 spatial-interpolation algorithm (Wiseair S.r.l.); facility-location optimization for Milan's public water network (MM S.p.A.)

GenAI & LLMOps.value: RAG & retrieval engineering, LLMs & multimodal, agentic orchestration & MCP, evaluation & guardrailing, AI observability, OpenAI, Anthropic & Azure OpenAI

Backend & Systems.value: Python & TypeScript, FastAPI, REST & GraphQL, event-driven pipelines & queues, OpenTelemetry distributed tracing, Docker, CI/CD

Data.value: SQL & NoSQL, Redis, vector & graph stores

Geospatial.value: PostGIS, GDAL, geopandas, shapely, rasterio, ArcGIS & QGIS
